entry.title: New: RES26-006 (Honolulu) — ZON
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE EXECUTION OF AN AMENDMENT TO GROUND LEASE, AND SECOND AMENDMENT TO DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT, RELATING TO THE SENIOR AFFORDABLE RENTAL PROJECT AT THE FORMER ʻAIEA SUGAR MILL SITE, 99-385 POHAI PLACE, ʻAIEA, OʻAHU, HAWAlʻI 96701 (TAX MAP KEY: (1) 9-9-078: 006).

Latest action: Cancelled and not considered.

View on the council site
